WebSocket [2] message
"{\"header\": {\"msg_id\": \"1118cb4f-eb4dc8ee034658336d66cd82_44063_179\", \"msg_type\": \"stream\", \"username\": \"username\", \"session\": \"1118cb4f-eb4dc8ee034658336d66cd82\", \"date\": \"2026-06-27T02:06:03.908245Z\", \"version\": \"5.3\"}, \"msg_id\": \"1118cb4f-eb4dc8ee034658336d66cd82_44063_179\", \"msg_type\": \"stream\", \"parent_header\": {\"msg_id\": \"216c95e4-acc5-40ff-963c-008b8c5bc3f4\", \"username\": \"username\", \"session\": \"c4ae4c67-bab4-4fe0-c936-200ebda0be61\", \"msg_type\": \"execute_request\", \"version\": \"5.0\", \"date\": \"2026-06-27T02:05:29.908826Z\"}, \"metadata\": {}, \"content\": {\"name\": \"stdout\", \"text\": \"   . [Link] If you are in direct danger, call 911 immediately.\\n\\nGiven the tornado warning you've received for Oklahoma City, act now to secure your safety:\\n\\n**See\\u2026\\n\\n   = FINAL (from deployed agent):\\nIf you are in direct danger, call 911 immediately.\\n\\nGiven the tornado warning you've received for Oklahoma City, act now to secure your safety:\\n\\n**Seek Immediate Shelter:**\\n*   Go to a basement, storm cellar, or safe room.\\n*   If underground shelter isn't available, go to a small, interior, windowless room on the lowest level of a sturdy building (like a closet or hallway).\\n*   Put as many walls as possible between you and the outside.\\n*   Stay in the center of the room and avoid corners.\\n*   Avoid auditoriums, cafeterias, and gymnasiums with flat, wide-span roofs.\\n\\n**Protect Yourself:**\\n*   Stay away from windows, doors, and outside walls.\\n*   Cover your head and neck with your arms.\\n*   Use furniture, blankets, or coats for additional protection.\\n*   Watch out for flying debris.\\n\\n**If You Are in a Car or Outdoors:**\\n*   Do not try to outrun a tornado in a vehicle.\\n*   If you can safely get to a sturdy building, do so immediately.\\n*   If outdoors and unable to get to a building, lie flat in a ditch or other low-lying area, covering your head with your hands.\\n*   If in a car and unable to get to a building, keep your seatbelt on, put your head down below the windows, and cover your head with your hands.\\n*   Do not seek shelter under bridges or overpasses.\\n\\n**Stay Informed:**\\nMonitor forecasts and warnings from reliable sources such as NOAA Weather Radios, local TV, radio, online news, and smartphone applications. If outdoor warning sirens are heard, immediately seek shelter and get more information. There is no official \\\"all-clear\\\" signal.\\n\\n==============================================================================\\n[User -> deployed ReadyNow]: I'm in Miami, FL ahead of a hurricane \\u2014 what's the driving route to safety in Orlando, FL?\\n==============================================================================\\n\"}, \"buffers\": [], \"channel\": \"iopub\"}"
